name: InstanceDefinition
summary: This is the same as InstanceDefinitionGeometry, but in a Rhino document.

methods.name: ClearId
methods.summary: Resets the HasId property of the model component to false, if possible.

methods.name: ClearIndex
methods.summary: Resets the HasIndex property of the model component to false, if possible.

methods.name: ClearName
methods.summary: Resets the HasName property of the model component to false, if possible.

methods.name: CreatePreviewBitmap(DefinedViewportProjection, Size)
methods.summary: Creates a wireframe preview bitmap of the instance definition.

returns.doc: The preview bitmap if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: CreatePreviewBitmap(DefinedViewportProjection, DisplayMode, Size)
methods.signature: public Bitmap CreatePreviewBitmap(DefinedViewportProjection definedViewportProjection, DisplayMode displayMode, Size bitmapSize)
methods.summary: Creates a preview bitmap of the instance definition.

returns.doc: The preview bitmap if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: CreatePreviewBitmap(DefinedViewportProjection, Size, Boolean)
methods.signature: public Bitmap CreatePreviewBitmap(DefinedViewportProjection definedViewportProjection, Size bitmapSize, bool applyDpiScaling)
methods.summary: Creates a wireframe preview bitmap of the instance definition.

params.name: applyDpiScaling
params.doc: Specify true to apply DPI scaling (Windows-only).

returns.doc: The preview bitmap if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: CreatePreviewBitmap(DefinedViewportProjection, DisplayMode, Size, Boolean)
methods.signature: public Bitmap CreatePreviewBitmap(DefinedViewportProjection definedViewportProjection, DisplayMode displayMode, Size bitmapSize, bool applyDpiScaling)
methods.summary: Creates a preview bitmap of the instance definition.

params.name: applyDpiScaling
params.doc: Specify true to apply DPI scaling (Windows-only).

returns.doc: The preview bitmap if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: CreatePreviewBitmap(Guid, DefinedViewportProjection, DisplayMode, Size, Boolean)
methods.signature: public Bitmap CreatePreviewBitmap(Guid definitionObjectId, DefinedViewportProjection viewportProjection, DisplayMode displayMode, Size bitmapSize, bool applyDpiScaling)
methods.summary: Creates a preview bitmap of the instance definition.

params.name: definitionObjectId
params.doc: Id of one of this definition's objects to draw selected.

params.name: applyDpiScaling
params.doc: Specify true to apply DPI scaling (Windows-only).

returns.doc: The preview bitmap if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: CreatePreviewBitmap(Guid, DefinedViewportProjection, IsometricCamera, Boolean, Size, Boolean)
methods.signature: public Bitmap CreatePreviewBitmap(Guid displayModeId, DefinedViewportProjection viewportProjection, IsometricCamera isometricCamera, bool drawDecorations, Size bitmapSize, bool applyDpiScaling)
methods.summary: Creates a preview bitmap of the instance definition.

params.name: displayModeId
params.doc: The id of the display mode to draw with.

params.name: drawDecorations
params.doc: Specify true to draw viewport decorations, such as grid and axes.

params.name: applyDpiScaling
params.doc: Specify true to apply DPI scaling (Windows-only).

returns.doc: The preview bitmap if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: DataCRC
methods.summary: Increments the Cyclic Redundancy Check value by this instance.

returns.doc: The updated remainder value.

methods.name: DeleteAllUserStrings
methods.summary: Deletes all user strings attached to this geometry.

methods.name: DeleteUserString
methods.summary: Deletes the user string with the specified key from this geometry.

params.name: key
params.doc: The key of the user string to delete.

returns.doc: True if the user string was deleted or did not exist; otherwise, false.

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: EnsurePrivateCopy
methods.summary: If you want to keep a copy of this class around by holding onto it in a variable after a command completes, call EnsurePrivateCopy to make sure that this class is not tied to the document. You can call this function as many times as you want.

methods.name: Equals
methods.summary: Equality is checked against InstanceDefinition.Id

returns.doc: True if obj.Id equals Id

methods.name: GetContainers
methods.summary: Gets a list of all the InstanceDefinitions that contain a reference this InstanceDefinition.

returns.doc: An array of instance definitions. The returned array can be empty, but not null.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Use Id.GetHashCode()

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.DocObjects.InstanceDefinition.GetHashCode"]

methods.name: GetObjectData
methods.signature: public virtual void GetObjectData(SerializationInfo info, StreamingContext context)
methods.summary: Populates a System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo with the data needed to serialize the target object.

methods.name: GetObjectIds
methods.summary: Returns the unique identifiers of all objects that are part of this instance definition's geometry table.

returns.doc: An array of Guid values representing the object IDs in the instance geometry table.

methods.name: GetObjects
methods.summary: Gets an array with the objects that belong to this instance definition.

returns.doc: An array of Rhino objects. The returned array can be empty, but not null.

methods.name: GetReferences
methods.summary: Gets a list of the CRhinoInstanceObjects (inserts) that contains a reference this instance definition.

params.name: wheretoLook
params.doc: 0 = get top level references in active document.1 = get top level and nested references in active document.2 = check for references from other instance definitions.

returns.doc: An array of instance objects. The returned array can be empty, but not null.

methods.name: GetUserString
methods.summary: Gets user string from this geometry.

params.name: key
params.doc: id used to retrieve the string.

returns.doc: string associated with the key if successful. null if no key was found.

methods.name: GetUserStrings
methods.summary: Gets a copy of all (user key string, user value string) pairs attached to this geometry.

returns.doc: A new collection.

methods.name: InUse
methods.summary: Determines whether the instance definition is referenced.

params.name: wheretoLook
params.doc: 0 = check for top level references in active document.1 = check for top level and nested references in active document.2 = check for references in other instance definitions.

returns.doc: true if the instance definition is used; otherwise false.

methods.name: IsValidWithLog
methods.summary: Determines if an object is valid. Also provides a report on errors if this object happens not to be valid.

params.name: log
params.doc: A textual log. This out parameter is assigned during this call.

returns.doc: true if this object is valid; false otherwise.

methods.name: LockId
methods.summary: Locks the component Id property.

methods.name: LockIndex
methods.summary: Locks the component Index property.

methods.name: LockName
methods.summary: Locks the component Name property.

methods.name: Object
methods.summary: returns an object used as part of this definition.

returns.doc: Returns an object that is used to define the geometry. Does NOT return an object that references this definition.count the number of references to this instance.

methods.name: SetUserString
methods.signature: public bool SetUserString(string key, string value)
methods.summary: Attach a user string (key,value combination) to this geometry.

params.name: key
params.doc: id used to retrieve this string.

returns.doc: true on success.

methods.name: ToJSON
methods.summary: Create a JSON string representation of this object

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.Runtime.CommonObject.ToJSON(Rhino.FileIO.SerializationOptions)"]

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Returns the name of the model component type, and then its name and index.
methods.remarks: This is provided as a visual aid. Do not rely on this for serialization.

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.DocObjects.ModelComponent.ToString"]

methods.name: UseCount()
methods.summary: Returns the number of references of this instance definition in the model. Both top-level references and nested instances are included in the count.

returns.doc: The number of references of this instance definition in the model.

methods.name: UseCount(Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public int UseCount(out int topLevelReferenceCount, out int nestedReferenceCount)
methods.summary: Returns the number of references of this instance definition in the model. Both top-level references and nested instances are included in the count.

returns.doc: The number of references of this instance definition in the model.

methods.name: UsesDefinition
methods.summary: Determines if this instance definition contains a reference to another instance definition.

returns.doc: 0 no 1 other_idef_index is the index of this instance definition >1 This InstanceDefinition uses the instance definition and the returned value is the nesting depth.

methods.name: UsesLayer
methods.summary: Returns true if some object in the instance definition is on the layer with the specified layer index.

params.name: layerIndex
params.doc: The index of layer to search for.

returns.doc: True if there is an object in the instance definition that is on the layer.

methods.name: UsesLinetype
methods.summary: Returns true if some object in the instance definition references the linetype with the specified linetype index.

params.name: linetypeIndex
params.doc: The index of linetype to search for.

returns.doc: True if there is an object in the instance definition that references that linetype.

properties.name: ArchiveFileStatus
properties.summary: Returns the archive file status of a linked instance definition.

properties.name: ComponentStatus
properties.summary: Gets or sets the component status of the model component.

properties.name: ComponentType
properties.summary: Returns InstanceDefinition.

properties.name: DeletedName
properties.summary: Gets the name of a component that is deleted.

properties.name: Description
properties.summary: Gets or sets the description of the definition.

properties.name: Disposed
properties.summary: Indicates if this object has been disposed or the document it originally belonged to has been disposed.

properties.name: HasId
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component has an ID.

properties.name: HasIndex
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component has an Index.

properties.name: HasName
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component has a Name.

properties.name: HasUserData
properties.summary: Gets true if this class has any custom information attached to it through UserData.

properties.name: Id
properties.summary: Gets or sets the ID of the current instance.

properties.name: IdIsLocked
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component ID is already locked.

properties.name: Index
properties.summary: Index of this instance definition in the index definition table.

properties.name: IndexIsLocked
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component Index is already locked.

properties.name: InstanceDefinitionModelSerialNumber
properties.summary: When a component is in a model as part of the information required for a linked instance definition, this value identifies the linked instance definition reference model.
properties.remarks: Reference components are not saved in .3dm archives. Typically this value is set and locked by the code that adds a component to a model. This value is not saved in .3dm archives.

properties.name: IsComponentStatusLocked
properties.summary: The component status itself can be locked. This returns an indication.

properties.name: IsDeleted
properties.summary: Returns true if this instance definition is deleted. Deleted object are not saved to a file archive.

properties.name: IsDocumentControlled
properties.summary: If true this object may not be modified. Any properties or functions that attempt to modify this object when it is set to "IsReadOnly" will throw a NotSupportedException.

properties.name: IsReference
properties.summary: An object from a work session reference model is reference a reference object and cannot be modified. An object is a reference object if, and only if, it is on a reference layer.

properties.name: IsSystemComponent
properties.summary: True if this model component is a system constant. An incomplete list of system constant model components is below:ON_ModelComponent::Unset ON_InstanceDefinition::Empty ON_Linetype::UnsetON_Linetype::ContinuousON_Linetype::ByLayerON_Linetype::ByParent ON_Layer::UnsetON_Layer::Default ON_TextStyle::UnsetON_TextStyle::DefaultON_TextStyle::ByLayerON_TextStyle::ByParent ON_DimStyle::UnsetON_DimStyle::DefaultON_DimStyle::DefaultInchDecimalON_DimStyle::DefaultInchFractionalON_DimStyle::DefaultFootInchArchitectureON_DimStyle::DefaultMillimeterSmallON_DimStyle::DefaultMillimeterLargeON_DimStyle::DefaultMillimeterArchitecture

properties.name: IsTenuous
properties.summary: True if this instance definition is from a linked file. It will be saved only if it is referenced by an instance reference object that is in the active geometry list and is being saved. Note that there can be multiple linked instance definitions with references to tenuous instance definitions.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Tests an object to see if it is valid.

properties.name: LayerStyle
properties.summary: Specifies how model components (layers, materials, dimension styles, etc.) from linked instance definition files appear in the active model.

properties.name: ModelSerialNumber
properties.summary: A value identifying the model that manages this component.
properties.remarks: If the component is being managed by a model, this value identifies the model. In Rhino, this value is the document runtime serial number. Typically this value is set and locked by the code that adds a component to a model. This value is not saved in .3dm archives.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name

properties.name: NameIsLocked
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component Name is already locked.

properties.name: ObjectCount
properties.summary: Number of objects this definition uses. This counts the objects that are used to define the geometry. This does NOT count the number of references to this instance definition.

properties.name: ReferenceModelSerialNumber
properties.summary: When a component is in a model for reference, this value identifies the reference model.
properties.remarks: Reference components are not saved in .3dm archives. Typically this value is set and locked by the code that adds a component to a model. This value is not saved in .3dm archives.

properties.name: SkipNestedLinkedDefinitions
properties.summary: This property applies when an instance definition is linked. If true, when reading the file that defines the content of the linked instance definition, skip any linked instance definitions found in that file. If false, when reading the file that defines the content of the linked instance definition, recursively load linked instance definitions found in that file.

properties.name: SourceArchive
properties.summary: Gets the full file path for linked instance definitions.

properties.name: UnitSystem
properties.summary: Gets the unit system of the instance definition. If the instance definition was imported from another 3dm file, the unit system may differ from that of the document.

properties.name: Url
properties.summary: Gets or sets the URL or hyperlink of the definition.

properties.name: UrlDescription
properties.summary: Gets or sets the description of the URL or hyperlink of the definition.

properties.name: UserData
properties.summary: List of custom information that is attached to this class.

properties.name: UserDictionary
properties.summary: Dictionary of custom information attached to this class. The dictionary is actually user data provided as an easy to use shareable set of information.

properties.name: UserStringCount
properties.summary: Gets the amount of user strings.
